name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Central government scholarship for Scheduled Caste students pursuing post-matric education. Covers tuition, maintenance allowance, and other charges for SC students from economically weaker families.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Central government scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students pursuing post-matric education. Provides financial assistance for tuition and living expenses to ST students from lower income households.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: National Scholarship Portal scholarship for Other Backward Class students. Supports OBC students pursuing higher education with financial assistance for academic and living expenses.

name: Maulana Azad National Fellowship / Post Matric Scholarship for Minorities
description: Scholarship for students belonging to six minority communities — Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Zoroastrian, and Jain. Covers maintenance and tuition for post-matric studies.

name: Prerana Scholarship — Odisha SC/ST
source: Odisha ST and SC Development Department
description: Odisha state scholarship for SC and ST students pursuing higher education within the state. Provides financial aid for tuition and hostel charges to encourage tribal and Dalit students.

name: Medhabruti Scholarship — Odisha
description: Merit-based scholarship for Odisha students who have scored 60% or above in their qualifying examination. Encourages academic excellence among students of all categories in Odisha.

name: Aakanksha Scholarship — Odisha SC Girl Students
description: Odisha state scholarship specifically for girl students from Scheduled Caste communities. Aims to improve female literacy and higher education participation among Dalit girls.

name: Nirman Scholarship — Odisha EWS
description: Odisha scholarship for Economically Weaker Section students who do not fall under SC/ST/OBC reservation. Supports EWS families in funding their children's higher education.

name: NSP Top Class Education Scholarship for SC Students
description: Premium scholarship for SC students studying in top-ranked institutions. Provides up to ₹2 lakh covering full tuition, books, living expenses for meritorious Dalit students in premier colleges.

name: Dr. Ambedkar Post-Matric Scholarship for EBC/DNT
source: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarship for Economically Backward Class and De-notified Tribe students. Named after Dr. B.R. Ambedkar, this scheme supports marginalised communities often excluded from SC/ST/OBC benefits.

name: NTPC Scholarship for SC/ST Students
description: Annual scholarship by NTPC for meritorious SC/ST students pursuing graduation in engineering, science, or humanities. Part of NTPC's CSR initiative to support underprivileged talented students.

name: HDFC Educational Crisis Scholarship Trust
description: One-time crisis scholarship for students facing sudden financial hardship due to loss of parent or guardian income. HDFC Bank helps students continue their education during family financial emergencies.

name: Tata Capital Pankh Scholarship
description: Annual scholarship by Tata Capital for deserving students from economically weaker sections. Supports students pursuing graduation or diploma courses with financial assistance for fees.

name: Vidyasaarathi Scholarship (NSDL)
description: Merit-cum-means scholarship on Vidyasaarathi platform by NSDL. Open to meritorious students with financial need, covering partial tuition fees for graduation and post-graduation.

name: Pragati Scholarship — AICTE (Girl Students, Technical Education)
description: AICTE Pragati scholarship for girl students enrolled in technical degree or diploma programmes. One girl per family can avail per year. Covers tuition, living expenses for 30,000 beneficiaries annually.

name: Saksham Scholarship — AICTE (Persons with Disability)
description: AICTE Saksham scholarship for students with disability (40% or more) enrolled in degree or diploma courses. Promotes inclusive education for differently-abled students in technical fields.

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships — MHRD
description: Central Sector Scheme for students who scored in top 20 percentile in Class 12 state board exams. Scholarship covers graduation and post-graduation with annual renewal based on academic performance.

name: ONGC Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC Students
description: ONGC scholarship for meritorious SC/ST/OBC students in graduation and post-graduation. ONGC Foundation provides ₹48,000 per annum for up to 2000 students from economically weaker backgrounds.

name: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship for NE and Special States
description: UGC Ishan Uday scholarship for students from J&K, North-East states, and economically backward regions including border districts of Odisha pursuing general graduation outside their home state.

name: L'Oreal India For Young Women in Science Scholarship
description: L'Oreal India scholarship for meritorious girl students pursuing science education. Awards ₹2.5 lakh to outstanding young women in science to encourage female participation in STEM fields.

name: Reliance Foundation Undergraduate Scholarship
description: Reliance Foundation merit-cum-means scholarship for undergraduate students in engineering, science, and humanities. Provides up to ₹2 lakh annually to exceptional students demonstrating academic excellence and financial need.

name: Prime Minister Scholarship Scheme for CAPF and AR
description: PM Scholarship for wards and widows of Central Armed Police Forces (CAPF) and Assam Rifles (AR) personnel. Provides ₹36,000 per annum for professional graduation degrees to support CAPF families.
